# SmartBooks by ReFurrm

> Secure year-round taxx and document management for individuals, gig workers, and small businesses. Upload documents, chat with your preparer, and file remotely.

SmartBooks by ReFurrm is a client portal and preparer collaboration platform. It combines secure document storage, AI-assisted classification, real-time messaging with a licensed preparer, transaction and mileage tracking, quarterly estimated taxx automation, and live return preview (1040, Schedule C, SE, D). The platform is built around bank-level encryption and a fully remote filing workflow.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and call to action
- [Features](/features): Full list of platform capabilities
- [Pricing](/pricing): Starter, Pro, and Business plans
- [Blog](/blog): Taxx tips, financial advice, and platform updates
- [Sign In](/login): Existing client sign in
- [Sign Up](/signup): Create a new account
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of SmartBooks
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How data is collected, stored, and protected

## Optional

- [Admin Sign In](/admin/login): Restricted access for staff accounts
